CustomField.description: Current sprint/week number within the active course. Updated by adapter after each module sync. Penny uses in L3 prompt: 'You are in Week 7 of 12.'
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Current sprint/week number within the active course. Updated by adapter after each module sync. Penny uses in L3 prompt: 'You are in Week 7 of 12.'
CustomField.label: Penny Sprint Week
